name: mofa-fm
author: hagency
description: Voice management and TTS with custom voice cloning via ominix-api

install.label: OminiX API server (Apple Silicon TTS inference)

ominix-api.description: Local inference server for Qwen3 TTS with voice cloning on Apple Silicon

ominix-mlx.description: MLX inference runtime for Qwen3-TTS on Apple Silicon

tools.name: fm_tts
tools.spawn_only_message: SUCCESS: Audio generation is now running in background. The audio file will be automatically delivered to the user when ready. No further action needed for this request.
tools.description: Synthesize speech from text. Call this tool directly with the full text — it runs in background automatically and the audio file is delivered to the user when ready. Do NOT use shell scripts or manual splitting. Supports long text, preset and custom voices.

text.description: The text to synthesize into speech

voice.description: Voice name: a preset ('vivian', 'serena', 'ryan', etc.) or a saved custom voice name. Default: 'vivian' or the user's default voice.

output_path.description: Path to save the audio file. Leave empty — the file is automatically saved to the workspace directory.

prompt.description: Optional style instruction in natural language. Without this, the model naturally varies tone based on text content. Set this to OVERRIDE content-based tone with a consistent style across the entire text. Write the instruction as a role/manner description appropriate to the use case — the model understands free-form Chinese or English instructions. Examples: news broadcast='用专业新闻播音员的语气朗读，语调平稳，节奏清晰', storytelling='用讲故事的语气，声音温暖，节奏有起伏', excited='用兴奋激动的语气说话', soft='用温柔轻柔的语气说话'. Leave empty when content-aware natural tone is desired.

speed.description: Speed factor: >1.0 = faster, <1.0 = slower. Range 0.5-2.0. Default: 1.0

tools.name: fm_voice_save
tools.description: Save an audio file as a named custom voice. ALWAYS call fm_voice_list first to check if the voice already exists — do NOT re-save existing voices. Only save new voices from user-provided audio clips (3-10 seconds of clear speech).

name.description: Name for the voice (alphanumeric and underscores only, e.g. 'my_voice', 'boss')

audio_path.description: Absolute path to the audio file to use as voice reference. Supports WAV directly and auto-converts MP3/M4A/OGG/FLAC to WAV before saving.

tools.name: fm_voice_list
tools.description: List all available voices (preset + saved custom). Call this FIRST before any TTS or voice_save to check what voices already exist.

tools.name: fm_voice_delete
tools.description: Delete a saved custom voice by name.

name.description: Name of the custom voice to delete
